title: Emergency Food Support for Flood-Affected Families
shortDescription: Help provide emergency food assistance to families struggling to recover after devastating floods in Kurigram.
beneficiary: Flood-affected families across vulnerable communities in Kurigram
story: Severe flooding across Kurigram has forced hundreds of families from their homes, leaving many without reliable access to food, clean water, and safe shelter. Entire communities have seen roads submerged, farmland damaged, and local markets disrupted, making daily survival increasingly difficult.

For many families, the flood arrived with little warning. Homes that took years to build were damaged within days, while stored food supplies were lost to rising water. Parents are now struggling to provide basic meals for their children while living in temporary shelters or overcrowded community spaces.

Although emergency response efforts have begun, many vulnerable households remain underserved due to damaged transportation routes and limited local resources. Elderly residents, children, and families with limited income face the greatest challenges as recovery continues.

This campaign will help fund emergency food packages containing essential items such as rice, lentils, cooking oil, salt, and other daily necessities. Local volunteers and community leaders will coordinate distribution efforts to ensure assistance reaches families with the most urgent needs.

Every contribution, regardless of size, helps provide immediate relief to people facing uncertainty and hardship. With your support, we can deliver critical food assistance while helping communities take their first steps toward recovery and stability.

updates.title: Initial Assessment Completed
updates.content: Volunteer teams completed field assessments across affected communities.

updates.title: Medical Team Deployment
updates.content: Healthcare volunteers have begun conducting medical assessments in targeted villages.

updates.title: Relief Supplies Delivered
updates.content: Emergency food and hygiene kits have reached over 500 families.

title: Medical Assistance for Rural Communities
shortDescription: Support essential healthcare services and medicine distribution for underserved families in remote villages.
beneficiary: Low-income families lacking access to healthcare services
story: Many rural communities continue to face significant barriers to healthcare access due to distance, limited medical facilities, and financial hardship.
Preventable illnesses often become severe because families cannot afford consultations, medicines, or transportation to hospitals.
Children, elderly residents, and pregnant women remain among the most vulnerable groups in these underserved regions.
This campaign will support mobile medical camps, essential medicine distribution, and basic health screenings.
Your contribution will help bring vital healthcare services closer to those who need them most.

updates.title: Medical Team Deployment
updates.content: Healthcare volunteers have begun conducting medical assessments in targeted villages.

title: School Supplies for Underprivileged Students
shortDescription: Help students continue their education by providing school supplies and learning materials.
story: Thousands of students face educational challenges because they lack access to basic school materials.
Many families struggle to purchase notebooks, textbooks, uniforms, and stationery due to financial constraints.
Without proper resources, students risk falling behind in their studies or dropping out entirely.
This campaign aims to provide complete education kits to deserving students.
Together, we can support children's dreams and create opportunities through education.

updates.title: School Selection Completed
updates.content: Partner schools have identified students who will receive support packages.

title: Safe Drinking Water for Drought-Prone Areas
shortDescription: Provide clean drinking water solutions to communities facing chronic water shortages.
beneficiary: Families affected by water scarcity and contamination
story: Access to clean drinking water remains a daily challenge for many communities in drought-prone regions.
Residents often rely on unsafe water sources that increase the risk of disease and health complications.
Women and children frequently travel long distances to collect water for household needs.
This campaign will support tube wells, water filtration systems, and community water access points.
Every donation helps create a healthier and more sustainable future.

updates.title: Site Survey Finished
updates.content: Engineers completed assessments for proposed water installation locations.

title: Winter Clothing Distribution Program
shortDescription: Help vulnerable families stay warm during the winter season through clothing assistance.
beneficiary: Children, elderly people, and low-income families
story: Winter temperatures can become especially difficult for families without adequate clothing and protection.
Many vulnerable individuals face health risks due to prolonged exposure to cold weather.
Children and elderly residents are particularly susceptible to seasonal illnesses.
Funds raised will help distribute blankets, jackets, sweaters, and other winter essentials.
Your support can provide comfort and protection during the coldest months.

updates.title: Collection Drive Started
updates.content: Volunteer teams have begun gathering winter clothing and preparing distribution plans.

title: Emergency Shelter Support After Cyclone
shortDescription: Provide temporary shelter materials and emergency assistance to cyclone-affected families.
beneficiary: Families displaced by severe cyclone damage
story: A powerful cyclone recently caused extensive damage across coastal communities, leaving many families homeless.
Strong winds and flooding destroyed homes, damaged infrastructure, and disrupted access to essential services.
Affected families are currently relying on temporary shelters and community support.
This campaign will fund emergency shelter kits, tarpaulins, bedding, and recovery assistance.
With timely support, we can help families regain safety and stability during recovery.

updates.title: Shelter Materials Procured
updates.content: Emergency shelter supplies have been purchased and distribution logistics are underway.
